home.title: Extract Keywords from Text or URL
home.subtitle: Free online keyword extraction tool — instant results, no signup required
home.noResults: Enter text or URL and click extract to see results
home.seoHowTitle: How to Extract Keywords in 3 Simple Steps
home.seoHowStep1Desc: Add your content directly or paste a webpage URL.
home.seoHowStep2Desc: Our algorithm analyzes word frequency and phrases instantly.
home.seoHowStep3Desc: Export your keywords as CSV or copy them to clipboard.
home.seoWhyDesc: Keyword extraction is essential for understanding content and optimizing your online presence.
home.seoWhy1: SEO Optimization — Identify focus keywords for your content
home.seoWhy2: Competitor Analysis — Understand what keywords competitors target
home.seoWhy3: Content Strategy — Plan your content around high-value keywords
home.seoWhy4: Market Research — Discover trending topics in your niche
home.seoUse1Desc: Find focus keywords to optimize blog posts and articles for search engines.
home.seoUse2Desc: Analyze competitor pages to identify keyword gaps and opportunities.
home.seoUse3Desc: Research market trends and discover what your audience is searching for.
home.seoUse4Desc: Extract key terms from academic papers and research documents.
home.seoFaq1A: Keyword extraction is the process of automatically identifying the most important words and phrases in a text. It helps summarize content, improve SEO, and understand what topics a document covers.
home.seoFaq2A: Yes! Basic keyword extraction from text and URLs is completely free. No signup required. Advanced AI-powered extraction is available with a Pro subscription.
home.seoFaq3Q: What's the difference between free and AI extraction?
home.seoFaq3A: Free extraction uses word frequency analysis — counting how often words appear. AI extraction uses deep learning to understand semantic meaning, identifying concepts even when different words are used.
home.seoFaq4Q: Can I extract keywords from a URL?
home.seoFaq4A: Yes, simply paste any webpage URL and we'll fetch and analyze the content. The tool respects robots.txt directives.
home.seoFaq5A: No, we don't store your text or extracted keywords. All processing happens in real-time and data is discarded immediately after extraction.
home.seoFaq6A: Our frequency-based algorithm provides highly accurate results for English text. For deeper semantic understanding and concept extraction, try our AI-powered Pro version.
home.invalidUrl: Please enter a valid URL (e.g. https://example.com)
home.noKeywordsFound: No keywords found. Try adding more content.
